journey.name: inbound-message
journey.description: A mesh peer broadcasts a text; the app must render the bubble. Connection is over TCP to a virtual meshtasticd node. Dismiss any permission/onboarding dialogs as they appear.

actions.action: Complete first-run onboarding if shown (grant location/notifications/Siri).
Add a manual TCP connection to {DUT_ADDR} (use an existing saved entry if present).
Verify the app reports it is connected/subscribed to the radio.
Open Messages, then Channels, then the Primary Channel.
Wait for an incoming message whose text contains {TOKEN} (the tester broadcasts it).
Verify a message bubble containing {TOKEN} is rendered in the Primary Channel.
